entry.title: IDC NNA10DF16B (28) awarded to MILLENNIUM ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION CO, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: OPERATIONALLY RESPONSIVE SPACE RAPID RESPONSE SPACE WORKS. THIS PROCUREMENT IS FOR A NEW NASA REQUIREMENT IN COLLABORATION AND SUPPORT OF THE OPERATIONALLY RESPONSIVE SPACE (ORS) OFFICE WITHIN THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. THE PROCUREMENT WILL CONTRIBUTE TO THE DEVELOPMENT OF LOW COST, RAPID REACTION PAYLOADS, BUSES, SPACELIFT, AND LAUNCH CONTROL CAPABILITIES IN ORDER TO FULFILL JOINT MILITARY OPERATIONAL REQUIREMENTS FOR ON-DEMAND SPACE SUPPORT AND RECONSTITUTION; TO COORDINATE AND EXECUTE OPERATIONALLY RESPONSIVE SPACE EFFORTS ACROSS THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE AND SPACE COMMUNITY TO INCLUDE NASA WITH RESPECT TO PLANNING, ACQUISITION, AND OPERATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:ultimateParentUEIName: MILLENNIUM ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION SERVICES LLC

entry.title: IDC NNA10DF16B (32) awarded to MILLENNIUM ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION CO, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: OPERATIONALLY RESPONSIVE SPACE RAPID RESPONSE SPACE WORKS.THE PERFORMANCE PERIOD FOR THIS CONTRACT IS EXTENDED FROM NOVEMBER 10, 2017 THROUGH NOVEMBER 09, 2018 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT WITH A POSSIBLE EXTENSION IAW THE OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT (MAR 2000) FROM NOVEMBER 10, 2018 THROUGH MAY 9, 2019. EACH INDIVIDUAL TASK ORDER WILL INCLUDE ITS OWN PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE.

entry.title: IDC NNA10DF16B (34) awarded to MILLENNIUM ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION CO, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCREASE THE MINIMUM/MAXIMUM AMOUNT OF SUPPLIES OR SERVICES (COST REIMBURSEMENT) BY 10% PURSUANT TO SECTION B.2(E)OF NNA10DF16B AS A RESULT OF AN INCREASE IN OPERATION REQUIREMENTS.
A. THE CURRENT SHARED CEILING BETWEEN RAPID RESPONSE SPACE WORKS (RRSW) AND MODULAR SPACE VEHICLES (MSV) CONTRACTS IS TO BE INCREASED BY 10% OF THE ORIGINAL $500,000,000 MAX AMOUNT TO $550,000,000.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:ultimateParentUEIName: MILLENNIUM ENGINEERING AND INTEGRATION SERVICES LLC
